tasks.title: Create component directory structure
tasks.description: Establish the directory structure for component organization
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Verify src/lib/components/ui directory exists before creating components
TDD: Test fails when directory structure is incomplete
TDD: Refactor directory organization if needed after verification

tasks.title: Extract type definitions to types.ts
tasks.description: FR-9: Create types.ts with PathData, GardenCard, and QuickLink interfaces
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test importing types before creating types.ts file
TDD: TypeScript compilation fails when types.ts doesn't exist or has incomplete definitions
TDD: Refactor type definitions for clarity and reusability after tests pass

tasks.title: Extract static data to data.ts
tasks.description: FR-9: Create data.ts with gardenCards and quickLinks arrays
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test importing data arrays before creating data.ts file
TDD: Test fails when data.ts doesn't export expected arrays with correct structure
TDD: Refactor data organization if needed after tests pass

tasks.title: Create BackgroundEffects component
tasks.description: FR-3: Build BackgroundEffects.svelte with noise overlay and scanlines
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test rendering BackgroundEffects component before implementation
TDD: Test fails when component doesn't render noise-overlay and scanlines divs
TDD: Refactor component structure for clarity after tests pass

tasks.title: Create Header component with typing animation
tasks.description: FR-1: Build Header.svelte with logo typing effect and scroll behavior
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test for typing animation behavior before implementing effect logic
TDD: Test fails when typedText doesn't match expected sequence or cursor doesn't blink
TDD: Refactor animation logic and cleanup handlers after tests pass

tasks.title: Add scroll behavior to Header
tasks.description: FR-1: Implement scroll-based background changes in Header component
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test simulating scroll event before implementing scroll handler
TDD: Test fails when navScrolled state doesn't update on scroll
TDD: Refactor event listener setup and cleanup after tests pass

tasks.title: Create Footer component
tasks.description: FR-2: Build Footer.svelte with brand section, link columns, and status
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test rendering Footer component before implementation
TDD: Test fails when component doesn't render brand, links, and status sections
TDD: Refactor responsive layout and link structure after tests pass

tasks.title: Create Hero section component
tasks.description: FR-4: Build Hero.svelte with label, title, subtitle, CTAs, and decorations
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test rendering Hero component before implementation
TDD: Test fails when component doesn't render all required sections (label, title, subtitle, description, CTAs, decorations)
TDD: Refactor component structure and styling after tests pass

tasks.title: Create GardenCard component
tasks.description: FR-5: Build GardenCard.svelte with SVG icon support and animations
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test rendering GardenCard with sample data before implementation
TDD: Test fails when component doesn't render SVG paths or apply correct animations
TDD: Refactor SVG rendering logic and animation configuration after tests pass

tasks.title: Add SVG path rendering to GardenCard
tasks.description: FR-5: Implement multi-type SVG path rendering (path, rect, polyline, line, circle)
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write tests for each SVG element type before implementing conditional rendering
TDD: Test fails when specific SVG element types don't render correctly
TDD: Refactor conditional logic for clarity after tests pass

tasks.title: Create QuickLink component
tasks.description: FR-6: Build QuickLink.svelte with slide animation and hover effects
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test rendering QuickLink with sample data before implementation
TDD: Test fails when component doesn't render as anchor or apply slide animation
TDD: Refactor animation and hover behavior after tests pass

tasks.title: Create SectionHeader component
tasks.description: FR-7: Build SectionHeader.svelte for reusable section headers
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test rendering SectionHeader with label and title props before implementation
TDD: Test fails when component doesn't render label or title with correct styling
TDD: Refactor component for reusability after tests pass

tasks.title: Create Button component with variants
tasks.description: FR-8: Build Button.svelte with primary and secondary variants
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write tests for both primary and secondary button variants before implementation
TDD: Test fails when variant doesn't apply correct styles or animations
TDD: Refactor variant logic and hover effects after tests pass

tasks.title: Integrate components into +layout.svelte
tasks.description: FR-10: Add Header, Footer, and BackgroundEffects to layout file
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test verifying layout renders all three components before integration
TDD: Test fails when any layout component is missing or improperly positioned
TDD: Refactor layout structure and component ordering after tests pass

tasks.title: Refactor +page.svelte to use extracted components
tasks.description: Replace inline markup with imported components in homepage
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write test verifying homepage renders with all components before refactoring
TDD: Test fails when page doesn't use extracted components or functionality breaks
TDD: Refactor page structure and component composition after tests pass

tasks.title: Verify visual parity with original implementation
tasks.description: Ensure refactored site matches original design exactly
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write visual regression tests or comparison checklist before refactoring
TDD: Test fails when any visual differences are detected
TDD: Refactor styling and positioning until tests pass

tasks.title: Verify all animations and interactions preserved
tasks.description: Test all animations, hover states, and interactive behaviors
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write interaction tests for typing animation, scroll behavior, and hover effects
TDD: Test fails when any animation timing or interaction behavior differs
TDD: Refactor animation configuration if needed after tests pass

tasks.title: Verify TypeScript compilation with strict mode
tasks.description: Ensure no TypeScript errors in refactored codebase
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Run TypeScript compiler before marking task complete
TDD: Compilation fails when type errors exist
TDD: Fix all type errors and verify strict mode compatibility

tasks.title: Test responsive behavior across breakpoints
tasks.description: Verify components work correctly at various viewport sizes
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write tests or manual checklist for responsive breakpoints (320px, 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px)
TDD: Test fails when layout breaks at any viewport size
TDD: Refactor responsive styles after identifying issues

tasks.title: Verify accessibility and keyboard navigation
tasks.description: Ensure all interactive elements are accessible
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Write accessibility tests for keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility
TDD: Test fails when focus states or ARIA attributes are missing
TDD: Refactor accessibility implementation after tests pass

tasks.title: Performance validation and bundle size check
tasks.description: Verify refactored code doesn't negatively impact performance
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Measure bundle size and load time before and after refactoring
TDD: Test fails if performance degrades significantly
TDD: Optimize imports and component structure if needed

tasks.title: Update component documentation
tasks.description: Add JSDoc comments and update README if needed
acceptanceCriteria: TDD: Review code for missing documentation before marking complete
TDD: Documentation incomplete without JSDoc for all public props
TDD: Refactor documentation for clarity after initial pass

rules: Write test first (RED) - test must fail
Write minimal code to pass (GREEN) - no optimization
Refactor only after test passes (REFACTOR) - maintain quality
All tasks must follow TDD cycle as acceptance criteria

riskMitigation: Test visual parity continuously during refactoring
Keep original +page.svelte as backup until integration verified
Use TypeScript strict mode to catch issues early
Test on multiple browsers and devices
